mission.title: prometheus: Add option to log slow queries and recording rules
mission.description: Add option to log slow queries and recording rules. This issue affects 41+ users.

steps.title: Upgrade to Prometheus 2.16 or later
steps.description:
Query logging requires Prometheus 2.16+. Check your version:
```bash
prometheus --version
```
Upgrade if needed via your package manager or Helm chart.

steps.title: Enable query logging
steps.description:
Add the query logging feature flag and log file path to your Prometheus startup arguments:
```bash
prometheus \
  --enable-feature=query-log \
  --query.log-file=/var/log/prometheus/queries.log \
  --config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
```
All PromQL queries (including recording rules) will be logged to the specified file.

steps.title: Configure query concurrency limits
steps.description:
To prevent slow queries from causing overload, set a concurrency limit:
```bash
prometheus \
  --query.max-concurrency=20 \
  --query.timeout=2m
```
The `--query.max-concurrency` flag limits how many queries can run simultaneously. The `--query.timeout` flag sets a maximum duration for any single query.

steps.title: Analyze the query log for slow queries
steps.description:
Review the query log file to identify slow queries:
```bash
# Find queries that took longer than 1 second
cat /var/log/prometheus/queries.log | python3 -c "
import sys, json
for line in sys.stdin:
    entry = json.loads(line)
    duration = entry.get('stats', {}).get('timings', {}).get('evalTotalTime', 0)
    if duration > 1.0:
        print(f'{duration:.3f}s - {entry["params"]["query"]}')
"
```
Optimize or rewrite queries with high `evalTotalTime` values.

resolution.summary: Prometheus 2.16+ added query logging via the `--enable-feature=query-log` flag. When enabled, all queries are logged to a file specified by `--query.log-file`. This enables identifying slow queries. Additionally, the `--query.max-concurrency` flag limits concurrent queries to prevent overload.
codeSnippets:
# Enable query logging in Prometheus 2.16+
prometheus \
  --enable-feature=query-log \
  --query.log-file=/var/log/prometheus/queries.log \
  --query.max-concurrency=20

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with prometheus installed or the issue environment reproducible.
